debug_info.goal:
α✝ nt✝ : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α✝ nt✝
⊢ ∀ (dt : G.DerivationTree), dt.result.len = dt.collectLeaves'.length

failed_attempts:
intro dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, Word.len]

intro dt
  induction dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
  rw [List.length_bind, List.length_bind]
  congr 1
  apply List.map_congr_left
  intros c hc
  rename_i ih
  apply ih
  exact hc

intro dt
  induction dt
  case mk prod children ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
    rw [List.length_bind, List.length_bind]
    congr 1
    apply List.map_congr
    intro c hc
    exact ih c hc

intro dt
  induction dt <;> simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, List.length_join]
  rw [List.map_map, List.map_map]
  congr
  apply List.map_congr_left
  assumption

intro dt
  induction dt with
  | mk _ _ children _ ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
    rw [List.length_join, List.length_join, List.map_map, List.map_map]
    exact congr_arg List.sum (List.map_congr ih)

intro dt
  induction dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, Word.mk, Word.length_mul_eq_add]
  congr
  simp_all

intro dt
  let rec proof (dt : ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree G) :
    Word.len dt.result = List.length dt.collectLeaves' := by
      unfold ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves'
      split
      · simp [Word.len]
      · simp [Word.len, List.length_bind]
        apply congrArg
        apply List.map_congr_left
        intro child h
        apply proof child
      termination_by dt.depth
      decreasing_by apply ContextFreeGrammar.child_less_depth _ _ h
  exact proof dt

intro dt
  induction dt
  all_goals
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
    try rw [List.length_join, List.length_join, List.map_map, List.map_map]
    try congr 1
    try apply List.map_congr
    try assumption

intro dt
  simp [Word.len, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result]

intro dt
  induction dt with
  | mk _ _ _ _ ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
    rw [List.length_join, List.length_join]
    congr 1
    apply List.map_congr
    exact ih

intro dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, Word.len]

intro dt
  induction dt
  case node p c v ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', List.length_join, List.map_map]
    apply List.sum_congr rfl
    intros x hx
    apply ih x hx

intro dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, Word.len]

intro dt
  induction dt
  next _ _ children ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
    induction children with
    | nil => simp [Word.eps_len_0.mp rfl]
    | cons c cs ih_cs =>
      simp [Word.length_mul_eq_add]
      rw [ih c (List.mem_cons_self _ _)]
      rw [ih_cs (fun x h => ih x (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h))]

  rw [List.length_flatten, List.length_flatten]
  congr 1
  apply List.map_congr_left
  assumption

  induction dt

    try simp [List.length_bind, List.length_join]
    try simp [*]

intro dt
  induction dt
  case leaf =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, Word.mk]
  case node _ children _ ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
    induction children
    case nil =>
      simp [Word.len, Word.mk, Word.eps_len_0]
    case cons head tail ih_tail =>
      simp [Word.length_mul_eq_add, List.length_join]
      rw [ih head (List.mem_cons_self _ _)]
      rw [ih_tail (fun t ht => ih t (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ ht))]

  induction dt <;> simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, List.bind, List.length_join]
  congr

  assumption

  simp [Word.len, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result]

  induction dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, List.length_join, List.map_map]
  congr
  apply List.map_congr
  assumption

intro dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, Word.len]

intro dt
  induction dt
  case node v children rule ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
    induction children
    case nil =>
      simp [Word.len, Word.mk]
    case cons head tail ih_tail =>
      simp
      rw [Word.length_mul_eq_add, List.length_append]
      rw [ih head (List.mem_cons_self _ _)]
      rw [ih_tail]
      intro t ht
      exact ih t (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ ht)

intro dt
  induction dt
  case leaf =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
  case node _ children ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves']
    induction children
    case nil => simp [Word.len]
    case cons head tail tail_ih =>
      simp
      rw [Word.length_mul_eq_add]
      rw [tail_ih]
      · rw [ih head (List.mem_cons_self _ _)]
      · intros x hx
        apply ih x (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hx)

intro dt
  simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, Word.len, Word.mk]
